name: MedGen, Inc.
summary: As of June 25, 2020, 9430075 Canada Ltd. was acquired by MedGen, Inc. in a reverse merger transaction. 9430075 Canada Ltd. operates an online health and wellness platform that helps consumers find the vital health information and referrals they need; and health and wellness professional to navigate to clients directly. The company was incorporated in 2015 and is based in Winnipeg, Canada.
